results.title: Former Super Bowl MVP plans to play in NFL in 2026
results.description: NFL star linebacker Von Miller isn’t ready to call it a career yet, telling ESPN he is planning to spend a 16th season in the league.

results.title: Steven Gerrard reveals major reason why Andoni Iraola replacing Arne Slot at Liverpool makes sense
results.description: LIVERPOOL legend Steven Gerrard pulled the curtain back on why it was the "right time" to sack Arne Slot. The club announced on Saturday morning that they would be parting ways with the Dutchman after two seasons together. Only 12 months ago, Slot helped deliver Liverpool's 20th Premier League trophy.
